# cli/gen/qaihm

Generated Go protobuf stubs for the `qaihm` proto package.

**Do not edit these files by hand.** They are generated from the `.proto`
definitions in [`cli/proto/`](../proto/) and committed to the repository so
that plain `go build` works without requiring any proto toolchain.

## Regenerating

Install [buf](https://buf.build/docs/installation) once, then from the `cli/`
directory run:

```sh
buf generate
```

Commit the resulting `*.pb.go` changes alongside any `.proto` changes.

## Proto source

Source definitions live in `cli/proto/`.
